and
e. any application for allocation must be approved by the National Lead Judge
or, if they are unavailable, by another High Court Judge.
41. The application for allocation to High Court Judge level may be made on or
shortly after issue of Form A, so as to allow the entire case (if the application is
granted) to proceed at that level. It is not acceptable for parties to wait until a
short time before the listed First Appointment and then ask for allocation to High
Court Judge level and a consequent vacation of the listed forthcoming First
Appointment in the local family court, as this generates delay and wastes time.
10
